metadata.title: Customer Stories | AdonERP
metadata.description: See how real teams use Adon ERP to scale their businesses. Read verified customer stories, case studies, and success stories from startups to enterprise groups across 45+ industries.

hero.title: use Adon ERP to
hero.description: From startups to enterprise groups — hear how hundreds of organisations transformed their operations with Adon ERP.

featuredStory.title: How IndoPacific Logistics cut 18 hrs/week in reconciliation
featuredStory.name: Rajesh Menon

featuresSection.title: Learn from those who have been there
featuresSection.description: Customer stories are more than marketing. They are honest accounts of decisions, trade-offs, and outcomes — from teams that chose Adon ERP.

features.title: Relevant match-making
features.description: Every story is tagged by industry, company size, and use case — so you can find the one closest to yours.

features.title: Peer-voted stories
features.description: Stories get rated by their readers. The most useful and relatable rise to the top so you spend less time browsing.

features.title: On-demand recordings
features.description: Every featured customer story comes with a 5-minute video summary — available immediately on any device.

features.title: Q&A with customers
features.description: Ask follow-up questions directly to the technology or operations lead behind each story.

storiesSection.title: Real results, real companies
storiesSection.description: Every story is verified. Numbers and quotes come directly from the customer — no editing, no spin.

stories.quote: Adon ERP replaced five separate tools we were paying for. The inventory and accounting modules alone saved us 18 hours a week in reconciliation work.
stories.name: Sofia Larsson

stories.quote: We went from a patchwork of spreadsheets to a single live dashboard in six weeks. Our warehouse team now tracks stock in real time — no more end-of-day surprises.
stories.name: Rajesh Menon

stories.quote: As a fast-growing startup, we needed a system that would grow with us. Adon ERP scales without adding a consulting bill every time we add a module.
stories.name: Adèle Moreau

stories.quote: The POS and restaurant modules work seamlessly together. Table turnover is up 22%, and our staff finally have one system to learn instead of three.
stories.name: Kwame Osei

stories.quote: Implementation took 10 days, not 10 weeks. The partner we worked with knew the software inside out and our industry at the same time.
stories.name: Julia Saab

stories.quote: We migrated from a legacy ERP in record time. The Adon ERP team and our partner worked shoulder to shoulder with our IT team through every milestone.
stories.name: Fritz Lehmann

stats.title: Average efficiency gain
stats.description: reported across all customer stories after their first year on Adon ERP.

stats.title: Faster go-live
stats.description: shorter implementation cycles compared to traditional ERPs, on average.

stats.title: User adoption
stats.description: of end-users choose to stay on Adon ERP when given the option to switch.

stats.title: Countries growing
stats.description: companies around the world trust Adon ERP for critical business operations.

testimonials.quote: Choosing Adon ERP was the best software decision our company has ever made. The migration was painless, and the ROI started showing in the first month.
testimonials.name: Erik Lindqvist

testimonials.quote: We evaluated eight ERP systems. Adon ERP was the only one our finance team actually enjoyed using. That says it all.
testimonials.name: Nadia Rossi

ctaSection.title: Your story could
ctaSection.subtitle: be next
ctaSection.description: Hundreds of companies have already shared their journey. Whether you are a startup or a large enterprise — we would love to hear yours.
ctaSection.footerText: Verified & unedited · Free to submit · SaaS, retail, services & more
